title: Path of the unknown
description:
A Path of Exploration, Progression, Trials and Myths. Do you dare take on the challenge of the unknown?


Pack will not be updated anymore, thank you for trying my pack :D
body:
**A Path of Exploration, Progression, Trials and Myths, Do you dare take on the challenge of the unknown?**
This mod pack includes many mods to aid in your survival or hurt your survival.

_updates are planed to be made on this pack stay tuned for the changes!_

**This is my first mod pack**, so it might not be the greatest but I'm proud of it :D

.

# Credit To All Mods In This Pack!



**Pack will not be updated anymore, thank you for playing my pack hope you enjoyed it :D**
